title: Char Grilled Algerian Samphire Skewers
description: A briny and gooey solo dinner dish featuring samphire, char grilled to perfection, served in a copper mug.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
Rinse the samphire and pat it dry with paper towels.
Thread the samphire onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Brush the mixture onto the samphire, making sure each piece is coated.
Grill the samphire for 2-3 minutes per side, or until it is charred and tender.
Remove the samphire from the grill and squeeze the lemon juice over the top.
Serve the samphire in a copper mug, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
